name: Review
description: A Review that features in an anime or manga

userId.description: The id of the review's creator

mediaId.description: The id of the review's media

mediaType.description: For which type of media the review is for

summary.description: A short summary of the review

rating.description: The total user rating of the review

ratingAmount.description: The amount of user ratings of the review

userRating.description: The rating of the review by currently authenticated user

score.description: The review score of the media

private.description: If the review is not yet publicly published and is only viewable by creator

siteUrl.description: The url for the review page on the AniList website

createdAt.description: The time of the thread creation

updatedAt.description: The time of the thread last update

media.description: The media the review is of
